claim_text: Donald Trump postponed a planned military attack on Iran after it sent a peace proposal to Washington.
evidence_text: Donald Trump said he postponed a planned military attack on Iran set for Tuesday after it sent a peace proposal to Washington.

claim_text: Iran's armed forces are more prepared and stronger than in the past.
evidence_text: Iran remained defiant in statements issued on state media after Trump’s announcement, warning the US and its allies against making any further 'strategic mistakes or miscalculations' in striking Iran and saying Iranian armed forces were 'more prepared and stronger than in the past'.

claim_text: Trump has decided to pause an attack on Iran.
evidence_text: Trump said he had been asked by the leaders of Qatar, Saudi Arabia and the UAE to hold off on a planned attack on Iran.

claim_text: Iran submitted a new peace proposal to the US.
evidence_text: Iran has submitted a revised 14-point peace plan to end the war, the semi-official Tasnim news agency reported.

claim_text: The US and Iran have major disagreements regarding uranium enrichment.
evidence_text: A major point of contention is Iran’s stockpile of enriched uranium.

claim_text: Energy bills will rise by £209 to £1,850 a year from July.
evidence_text: A typical gas and electricity bill is forecast to reach £1,850 a year from July under the industry regulator Ofgem’s quarterly price cap.

claim_text: The increase is nearly 13% higher than the previous cap of £1,641.
evidence_text: The expected rise is nearly 13% higher than the £1,641 cap on energy bills set for April to June.

claim_text: Even if the Iran war ended, prices may not return to previous levels.
evidence_text: the physical damage to infrastructure, and lingering effect of disrupted supply, means a fall back to April’s price cap levels in the autumn looks unlikely.

claim_text: Trump will postpone a scheduled attack against Iran.
evidence_text: United States President Donald Trump has announced he will postpone a “scheduled attack” against Iran at the request of regional leaders in the Middle East.

claim_text: Serious negotiations are taking place.
evidence_text: The reversal, he said, came in light of the fact that “serious negotiations are now taking place”.

claim_text: Donald Trump said he 'wasn’t involved in' the creation of a so-called anti-weaponization fund.
evidence_text: Trump said he “wasn’t involved in” the creation of a so-called anti-weaponization fund.

claim_text: The fund would be administered by a committee of talented people.
evidence_text: Trump said 'it’ll all be dependent on a committee' of 'very talented people'.

claim_text: Labour members believe the party is likely to win the next election with Burnham as leader.
evidence_text: Recent polling indicates that Labour members think the party is more likely to win the next election with Burnham as leader.

claim_text: Burnham leads Starmer in a head-to-head poll.
evidence_text: When YouGov boiled it down to a choice between Starmer and Burnham, Burnham was ahead by a factor of 3 to 2.

claim_text: Angela Rayner has the highest favorability ratings among potential leadership candidates.
evidence_text: Angela Rayner, the former deputy PM, has the highest favourability ratings of any potential leadership candidate.

claim_text: Iran's domestic league was suspended due to conflict.
evidence_text: The country’s domestic Persian Gulf Pro League season was suspended after the United States and Israel attacked Iran on February 28.

claim_text: Most players have not played for seven weeks.
evidence_text: most of the players having been out of action for seven weeks.

claim_text: Iran will play New Zealand in their first World Cup match.
evidence_text: At the World Cup, Iran will take on New Zealand on June 15.

claim_text: Trump has called off a planned attack on Iran.
evidence_text: Trump says he has called off a planned attack on Iran on Tuesday at the request of Gulf states so peace talks could continue.

claim_text: A deal is being negotiated that would prevent Iran from obtaining nuclear weapons.
evidence_text: Trump said he had been told a deal would be made that is 'very acceptable' to the US, adding there would be 'no nuclear weapons for Iran'.

claim_text: Kim Jong Un feels emboldened by North Korea's nuclear capabilities.
evidence_text: Experts believe Kim Jong Un was alarmed by the U.S. decapitation strikes that killed Iran's leaders.

claim_text: North Korea has enacted laws to deter decapitation strikes.
evidence_text: Choi Yonghwan says Pyongyang enacted a 2022 law with a section intended to deter decapitation strikes.

claim_text: North Korea signed a mutual defense pact with Russia in 2024.
evidence_text: North Korea signed a mutual defense pact with Russia in 2024 and sent troops to help fight Ukraine the same year.

claim_text: Global fertiliser supplies must be freed up within weeks to avoid disaster.
evidence_text: Global fertiliser supplies must be freed up within weeks to avoid disaster, with harvests suffering and food prices rising, the UK’s foreign secretary, Yvette Cooper has said.

claim_text: The war in Iran has frozen shipments of fertiliser through the strait of Hormuz.
evidence_text: The war in Iran has frozen shipments of fertiliser through the strait of Hormuz, creating a supply crunch that has already damaged farming in the UK, Europe and the US.

claim_text: The World Food Programme estimates that almost 45 million more people could fall into acute food insecurity.
evidence_text: The World Food Programme estimates that almost 45 million more people could fall into acute food insecurity if the Iran conflict does not end by the middle of this year.

claim_text: Unemployment in the UK has risen to 5%.
evidence_text: Unemployment in the UK has unexpectedly risen to 5% while wage growth has slowed.

claim_text: The number of payrolled employees dropped by 100,000 in April.
evidence_text: More up-to-date tax data showed the number of payrolled employees dropped sharply in April, falling by 100,000.

claim_text: Unemployment for 18-24 year-olds reached 14.7%.
evidence_text: The unemployment rate for 18- to 24-year-olds rose to 14.7% in the three months to March.

claim_text: The Bank of England expects unemployment to rise to 5.6% by summer 2027.
evidence_text: The Bank of England expects unemployment to hit 5.1% by the middle of this year and then rise to between 5.5% and 5.6% by the summer of 2027.

claim_text: The UAE has blamed a fire near its nuclear power plant on a drone launched by Iran or one of its proxies.
evidence_text: The United Arab Emirates has blamed a fire near its nuclear power plant on a drone launched by Iran or one of its proxies in what the UAE called a 'dangerous escalation'.

claim_text: Ryanair has 'almost zero concerns' about jet fuel supplies this summer.
evidence_text: Ryanair said it has 'almost zero concerns' about its jet fuel supplies this summer amid fears over widespread cancellations linked to the Iran war.

claim_text: Holidaymakers booking flights later this year could face higher fares.
evidence_text: Ryanair warned that holidaymakers booking their flights later this year could face higher fares.

claim_text: Ryanair hedged 80% of its jet fuel requirements to April 2027.
evidence_text: While Ryanair has hedged 80% of its jet fuel requirements to April 2027 at about $67 a barrel.

claim_text: Trump is holding off on a military strike on Iran.
evidence_text: Trump said he is holding off on a military strike on Iran planned for Tuesday because 'serious negotiations' are underway to end the war.

claim_text: Gulf allies requested a delay in military action.
evidence_text: He said America's allies in the Gulf asked him to wait for two to three days because they feel they are close to a deal with Iran.

claim_text: Oil prices fell after Trump's announcement.
evidence_text: Trump's post quickly caused a fall in the price of oil, which had been rising on the prospect of a prolonged standoff.

claim_text: The U.S. and Israel are preparing for a possible restart of active warfare against Iran.
evidence_text: The U.S. and Israel are preparing for the possible restart of active warfare against Iran.

claim_text: President Trump indicated that Iran must act quickly to avoid severe consequences.
evidence_text: President Trump wrote on social media Sunday, for Iran, the clock is ticking, and they better get moving fast, or there won't be anything left of them.

claim_text: Iran is attempting to find a diplomatic solution amid military threats.
evidence_text: Iran appears to be trying to find a diplomatic way out. This weekend, Iran held talks with Qatar, Turkey and Pakistan.

claim_text: Israeli authorities are demolishing homes in Silwan to expel Palestinian residents.
evidence_text: Hundreds of Palestinians like Abu Diab are being pushed out of Silwan by Israeli authorities to make way for Israeli settlers.

claim_text: The actions of the Israeli government amount to ethnic cleansing.
evidence_text: Israeli human rights organization B'Tselem and U.N. human rights experts say Israeli actions to force increasing numbers of Palestinian families out of East Jerusalem and the West Bank amount to ethnic cleansing.

claim_text: The drone strike cut off external power to a nuclear reactor in the UAE.
evidence_text: A drone strike that cut off external power to a nuclear reactor in the United Arab Emirates this week has revived concerns over the safety of nuclear plants during wartime.

claim_text: The Barakah nuclear plant's reactor no 3 lost off-site power for about 24 hours.
evidence_text: Reactor no 3 at the Barakah nuclear plant lost off-site power, which is critical for its own functioning, for about 24 hours after the attack on Sunday.

claim_text: The UAE's nuclear safety regulator stated that the attack did not cause any radioactive material to be released.
evidence_text: The UAE’s nuclear safety regulator said the attack did not cause any radioactive material to be released.

claim_text: Iran's peace proposal includes reparations for war damage and US troop withdrawal.
evidence_text: Tehran's latest peace proposal to the United States involves ending hostilities on all fronts including Lebanon, the exit of US forces from areas close to Iran, and reparations for destruction caused by the US-Israeli war.

claim_text: Trump has paused a planned attack against Iran.
evidence_text: Trump said he had instructed the US military that 'we will NOT be doing the scheduled attack of Iran tomorrow.'

claim_text: There is a 'very good chance' of reaching a deal limiting Iran's nuclear program.
evidence_text: US President Donald Trump said there was now a 'very good chance' of reaching a deal limiting Iran's nuclear program.

claim_text: The UK unemployment rate rose to 5% in March 2026.
evidence_text: The UK unemployment rate jumped back to 5% in March.

claim_text: The rise in unemployment is linked to the Iran war.
evidence_text: The first set of figures affected by the conflict.

claim_text: Payrolled jobs fell by 100,000 in April 2026.
evidence_text: The number of payrolled jobs in the economy fell 100,000, or 0.3%, in April.

claim_text: Regular pay growth is at its weakest since the COVID-19 pandemic.
evidence_text: Regular pay, excluding bonuses, increased at a rate of just 3.4% from January to March.

claim_text: Iran is using disposable operatives for terrorism in the West.
evidence_text: The detention of Mohammed Saad Baqer al-Saadi revealed rare details of Iran’s efforts to use terrorism to sow discord among communities in Europe, the UK and the US.

claim_text: Al-Saadi is connected to 18 separate attacks.
evidence_text: He is accused of being connected to 18 separate attacks including firebombings of synagogues and community centres in Belgium, the Netherlands and the UK.

claim_text: Recruitment for terrorism is occurring via social media.
evidence_text: Recruitment has occurred on Snapchat and Telegram, frequently in groups or channels where people trade drugs or organise other criminal activity.

claim_text: Trump postponed a planned military attack on Iran.
evidence_text: Trump said he had been asked by the leaders of several Gulf countries to 'hold off on our planned Military attack [on Iran], which was scheduled for tomorrow.'

claim_text: Iran has made a new proposal to end the war.
evidence_text: Iran has made a new proposal for a deal to definitively end the war in the Middle East, officials in the region said on Monday.

claim_text: Trump postponed a planned attack on Iran.
evidence_text: The US president says he postponed a planned attack on Iran after requests from the leaders of Qatar, Saudi Arabia and the United Arab Emirates.

claim_text: Iran's participation in talks does not mean surrender.
evidence_text: Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian defended Tehran’s participation in talks while rejecting suggestions that the country was backing down under pressure.

claim_text: Israeli strikes have killed over 3,000 people in Lebanon.
evidence_text: Israeli strikes have killed more than 3,000 people in Lebanon since March 2, the Ministry of Public Health said.
